title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Own core payment services written in Python and Django. Design scalable APIs, optimize PostgreSQL, and ship to AWS. You will lead architecture decisions for high-throughput microservices.

title: Frontend Engineer (React)
description: Build accessible, fast user interfaces in React, TypeScript and Next.js. Partner with design to craft polished experiences and a reusable component library.

title: Data Engineer
description: Design and operate batch and streaming data pipelines with Spark and Airflow. Model warehouse tables in SQL and guarantee data quality across the ETL stack.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Train and deploy NLP models with PyTorch and transformers. Build MLOps pipelines for evaluation, serving and monitoring of production machine learning systems.

title: DevOps / Platform Engineer
description: Run our Kubernetes platform and Terraform-managed AWS infrastructure. Improve CI/CD, container builds, and observability so product teams ship safely and quickly.

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description: Work across the stack with Node.js, React and TypeScript. Design GraphQL APIs over PostgreSQL and deliver features end to end for our B2B SaaS product.

title: Product Designer
description: Lead end-to-end product design in Figma: research, flows, prototypes and a scalable design system. Collaborate closely with engineering to ship delightful experiences.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Drive product decisions with rigorous experimentation and causal inference. Build models in Python, analyze data with SQL and pandas, and communicate insights to leadership.

title: iOS Engineer
description: Build a flagship consumer iOS app with Swift and SwiftUI. Own features from concept to App Store release and obsess over performance and smooth interactions.

title: Security Engineer
description: Lead application security: threat modeling, secure code review, and cloud hardening. Partner with engineers to fix OWASP-class issues and automate security checks.

title: Engineering Manager
description: Lead a team of 6 engineers. Set technical direction, grow people through mentoring and feedback, and partner with product to deliver a reliable roadmap.

title: Product Manager
description: Own the data platform roadmap. Run discovery with customers, prioritize ruthlessly, and ship measurable outcomes with engineering and design.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Build end-to-end test suites in Playwright and TypeScript. Wire tests into CI/CD and raise quality bars across mobile and web releases.

title: Technical Writer
description: Write clear developer documentation, API references and tutorials. Improve onboarding and the overall developer experience for our AI platform.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Design secure, cost-efficient AWS architectures for enterprise customers. Lead cloud migrations, infrastructure-as-code with Terraform, and Kubernetes adoption.

title: Growth Marketing Manager
description: Drive growth across SEO, content and paid acquisition. Run experiments, own lifecycle marketing, and report on funnel analytics to the leadership team.
